[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Noda''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]].

==Biography==
In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was assigned to the fleet of [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]], and was tasked with destroying the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]. In preparation for the [[Subjugation of Sulon]], Noda was ordered to paint the Rebel crest on his vehicles in a move to discredit the Rebels for their aggressive actions; although he followed orders, he didn't see the point, as the notion that the Alliance would capture such material seemed unrealistic to him.

Noda commanded an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] towards the [[Geothermal tap|G-Tap]]. His vehicle was moving downstream, accompanied by two [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]].

The ground forces managed to push the defenders into the cave. Those of the thirty-seven survivors who could still stand, were lined up and sorted in front of the G-Tap. Noda, having a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] with profiles combined from Jerec's agents and [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]], personally inspected and identified each one; Jerec ordered that leading figures would be held for interrogation while the rest would be executed.

==Appearance and traits==
Noda had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], almond-shaped eyes, and high cheekbones.

Although not a coward, he was a naturally cautious man, and was stressed by the knowledge that Jerec was monitoring all his communications and movements

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
